mapper.select: select r.id, r.user_id, stu.name as userName, r.seat_id, s.seat_number, r.date, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.leave_time, r.status, r.reservation_no as reservationNo, r.create_time, r.update_time, s.room_id, r.room_name from seat_reservation r left join student stu on r.user_id = stu.id left join seat s on r.seat_id = s.id where r.id = #{id}
